name: HIPAA Insider Threat — Unauthorized Patient Data Access
description: Simulates a healthcare insider accessing patient records outside their care team scope — a HIPAA violation scenario.

steps.description: Employee logs into EHR system at 2 AM outside normal hours.
Employee queries 500+ patient records unrelated to their care assignments.

payload.command: SELECT * FROM patient_records WHERE department != 'ICU' LIMIT 500

steps.description: Employee exports PHI to personal email.
